identity.canonical_title: Gravitational Emergence Modification to Einstein Equations

theory.canonical_statement: TZP singularities introduce additional source terms into the Einstein equations, altering spacetime curvature.
theory.technical_interpretation: TZP singularities introduce additional source terms into the Einstein equations, altering spacetime curvature.

equation_progression.interpretive_role: This fixes the Einstein equation modified by the topological singularity sector.
This identifies the asymptotic regime in which the singular contribution decays away and classical gravity is recovered.
This closes the entry by stating the singular concentration of the correction term at the zero-point locus itself.
